'''''Star Wars: Empire: In the Shadows of Their Fathers''''' was the ninth story arc in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]''. It consisted of issues 29-30 and 32-34. It was originally going to be titled '''''Sons'''''.
